messages.content:
It is nice to e-meet you. 

Thank you so much for providing the information and documents, and well noted that you will also provide your HKID and residence details once available. We will also contact you again if we need further information from you.

please check sentences
There are no apparent issues with the sentences you provided. They are clear and grammatically correct.

As we did not hear form you further to our below email, we would like to follow up with you again. We would be grateful if you could provide and complete the following attached documents to us via return email

check please

As we have not received any further communication from you regarding our previous email, we wanted to follow up and kindly request that you provide and complete the attached documents. We would greatly appreciate it if you could send them back to us via email.

Please note that Deloitte HK is authorized by JLL to prepared your Tax Return, which means that you do not need to handle the 2022/23 Tax Return yourself and we will send the completed Tax Return for your review once it is ready. 

Meanwhile, please sign on the blank Tax Return then forward the signed originals to us for onward preparation.

check please

Please be informed that Deloitte HK has been authorized by JLL to handle the preparation of your Tax Return for the year 2022/23. This means that you do not need to handle the Tax Return yourself. Once we have completed the Tax Return, we will send it to you for your review.

In the meantime, we kindly request that you sign the blank Tax Return and send the signed originals to us. This will enable us to proceed with the preparation process.
Meanwhile, please sign on the blank Tax Return then forward the signed originals to us for onward preparation.

In the meantime, we kindly request that you sign the blank Tax Return and forward the signed originals to us for onward preparation. This will allow us to proceed with the necessary steps. Thank you for your cooperation.
Thank you for letting us know you have received your 2022/23 Individual Tax Return (“Tax Return”) from the Inland Revenue Department
Thank you for informing us that you have received your 2022/23 Individual Tax Return from the Inland Revenue Department.

Please sign the blank tax return and send the signed originals to us for onward preparation. We will confirm receipt upon receipt and arrange preparation accordingly. Once we have completed the Tax Return, we will send it to you for your review and approval.

Please be advised to sign the blank tax return and send the signed originals to us for further preparation. Once we receive the signed documents, we will confirm receipt and proceed with the necessary arrangements. After completing the Tax Return, we will send it to you for your review and approval.
Once we receive the signed documents, we will confirm receipt and proceed with the preparation.  After completing the Tax Return, we will send it to you for your review and approval.

Thank you for your response. Once we have received the signed documents, we will confirm receipt and proceed with the preparation of the Tax Return. Upon completion, we will send the prepared Tax Return to you for your review and approval.

Please sign the blank tax return and send the signed originals to us for further preparation. Once we have received the signed documents, we will confirm receipt and proceed with the preparation of the Tax Return. Upon completion, we will send the prepared Tax Return to you for your review and approval.

Thank you for your request. We kindly ask you to sign the blank tax return and send the signed originals to us for further preparation. Once we receive the signed documents, we will confirm their receipt and proceed with the preparation of your Tax Return. Once the Tax Return is completed, we will send it to you for your review and approval.

Please sign the blank tax return and send the signed originals to us for further preparation. Once we have received the signed documents, we will confirm receipt and proceed with the preparation of the Tax Return. Upon completion, we will send the prepared Tax Return to you for your review and approval.

check sentence
The sentence is grammatically correct and effectively communicates the requested action and subsequent steps.

Per our record, we understand that your spouse is running a partnership with her sister, please confirm if she was employed as an employee and earning employment income during the year 2022/23 (i.e. for the period from April1, 2022 to March 31, 2023)

check sentence

Per our records, we understand that your spouse is running a partnership with her sister. Please confirm if she was employed as an employee and earned employment income during the year 2022/23 (i.e., for the period from April 1, 2022, to March 31, 2023).
